creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: remko->murray

I've added an entry for EnderUnix to the usergroup page in CVS.  It 
should be live on the website within 6 hours. 

If you would also like a commercial consulting entry for enderunix 
then please file another PR with the exact text.  My understanding of 
enderunix is more like a usergroup, but if you also do consulting of 
this type for paying clients then I have no objection to listing 
enderunix in both parts of the website. 

Thanks for the submission!
